title: English Primary Paper 2 question-section detection output (v1.2)
description: JSON shape emitted by Cursor agent english-paper-2-question-section-detector.md (spec version v1.2). Extends v1.1: each section carries a required `question_info` array (one element per question index) with per-question marks and page metadata, analogous to Mathematics/Science—the sequence of `question_index` is canonical (replacing the v1.1 `question_indices` array). `stem_page_range` / `answer_page_range` rules are unchanged from v1.1. Legacy artifacts with **`schema_version`**: **`v1.1`** or **`v1.0`** use the corresponding older schema files. See agent doc and english_exam_paper2_question_types.md for semantics.

schema_version.description: Must match the detector output spec; select the JSON Schema file with the same version suffix (e.g. *.v1.2.schema.json).

sections.description: Detected sections in document reading order.

uuidOrEmpty.description: `pdf_files.id` from Ai Study Buddy PdfFileManager (UUID); empty string when unset or lookup miss.

path.description: Canonical absolute path (`PdfFile.path`) from `PdfFileManager.get_file_by_path` / `get_file`, or "" only when unavailable.

role.description: How this PDF was interpreted for 1-based page indices (merged Booklet A+B, separate booklets, or OAS-only file).

notes.description: Per-file caveats (lookup miss, `_raw_` vs `_c_`, encrypted PDF, …).

files.description: Input PDF paths the detector relied on.

hints.description: Parent-supplied hints (page ranges, OCR snippets, filename keywords, …).

notes.description: Detector-side input summary (render DPI, cache-only renders, …).

generation_model.description: Actual detector model id (never the YAML orchestration sentinel "inherit").

confidence.description: Aggregate confidence for the entire detection run.

question_index.description: Printed question label (`Q1`, `Q66`, …), matching legacy v1.x `question_indices` strings.

question_mark.description: Marks for this question from the paper (MCQ often 1 per item; follow printed brackets for OE).

start_page.description: 1-based page index (within the inspected PDF) where the question stimulus or first response target appears. For sections where the item body is only on an OAS grid, use the page where the corresponding prompt appears in the question booklet (or the OAS page if that is the sole locus for that item type—see agent spec).

end_page.description: 1-based page where the question ends when spanning pages; omit if single-page.

printed_section_title.description: Verbatim printed section heading when it adds source fidelity; omit or "" when unknown or redundant.

section_total_marks.description: Total marks for this detected section. Include only when confident (i) the numeric total read from the paper is correct and (ii) that total applies to this section alone—not a parent block spanning multiple canonical sections unless split into defensible per-section totals. Omit when uncertain, illegible, only per-item marks exist without a clear section total, or the printed total clearly bundles multiple canonical sections without a defensible split (explain in `debug.notes` when helpful).

question_info.description: Per-question metadata in reading order—canonical replacement for the flat `question_indices` list in v1.1.
